title: Invest
description: Invest adds a passive income system to your server.
body:
Invest is a powerful and balanced investment plugin for Minecraft servers running Paper 1.21.4.

With this plugin, players can invest their in-game money and earn passive income over time while they are online. The system is fully time-based, economy-safe, and designed for long-term progression.

🔹 Key Features

Invest money using /invest <amount>

Passive income paid every minute

Profit based on invested amount and investment level

Multiple investment levels with increasing limits

Permanent multipliers unlocked by leveling up

No withdrawals – investments are final

Online-only profit (no offline abuse)

Actionbar profit notifications (toggleable)

Investment leaderboard (Top 25 + personal rank)

Full PlaceholderAPI support

Admin commands to manage player investments

Vault & EssentialsX economy support

Fully configurable and performance-safe

🔹 Perfect for:

Economy servers

Survival & SMP servers

Long-term progression systems

Servers that want passive income without inflation abuse

Invest integrates seamlessly into existing economies and gives players a rewarding long-term goal while keeping the system fair and balanced.
